title: A godly man feels everything. He's just not run by it.
caption:
Most men think the goal is to stop feeling things. That's not it.

A man of God feels everything — the anger, the fear, the loneliness, the wanting to be seen. He's just not ruled by any of it.

The paradox is: governing yourself isn't suppression. It's the thing that makes you free. A man who reacts to every feeling is owned by them. A man who can name the feeling and still choose — that man is actually free.

"Where the Spirit of the Lord is, there is freedom." — 2 Cor. 3:17

This week: pause before you react. Name what's underneath it. Ask who's actually steering. Then do what you said you'd do.

Save this for the moment the feeling shows up and wants to run things.

#faith #selfmastery #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #thework #christianity #scripture
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
